purpose: Registry of APPROXIMATE geographic-context layers added around the audited Petoskey Pit CivicBowl UE scene, so it can be reviewed at human/civic scale (city, bay, horizon, sunset). Every layer DECLARES its provenance. Context never edits or gates the audited design geometry (see scripts/unreal/context_common.py: assert_disjoint_from_design).

site.name: Petoskey Pit / CivicBowl, Petoskey MI
site.latlon_provenance: EPSG:6494 local origin [19533067.7, 750799.2] ft -> EPSG:4326 via pyproj Transformer(always_xy); recorded as a constant so the solar calc needs no GIS deps
site.water_surface_elev_provenance: MEASURED via EPT viewshed analysis (scripts/build_site_context.py); elevation measured, drawn planar extent is a simplified proxy
site.outliner_root_note: Disjoint from every audited design folder root; excluded from design-count gates.

redistributability_policy: Only open / derived / computed data is committed or built. No proprietary Google Earth/Maps/Street View geometry, imagery, or DEM is imported. OSM-derived layers carry ODbL attribution. Layers marked redistributable:false are refused by the generator and verifier.

layers.source: Little Traverse Bay water surface; elevation 579.45 ft NAVD88 (EPT viewshed analysis). Planar extent is a simplified rectangle NNW of the site.
layers.accuracy_class: elevation MEASURED (+/-0.5 ft); horizontal extent APPROXIMATE (simplified rectangle, not a surveyed shoreline)
layers.notes: Flat horizontal surface at the water elevation, far below seating and the NW rim; the thing being viewed, not an occluder.

layers.source: Optional OSM coastline / natural=water edge at data/context/shoreline.geojson; else a straight-line proxy perpendicular to the bay-view axis at the simplified water near-edge.
layers.accuracy_class: OSM shoreline ~few m where present; else straight-line PROXY (schematic, non-surveyed)
layers.expected_input: data/context/shoreline.geojson (EPSG:4326 LineString features; fetch via scripts/unreal/fetch_osm_context.py)

layers.source: Experiential far-horizon reference band beyond the bay along the bay-view axis.
layers.accuracy_class: NON-METRIC visual reference only; not a measured landform
layers.notes: Tall thin band far NNW; closes the view without claiming a real far-shore profile. Neutral material.

layers.source: OSM building footprints, extruded. Generic height when no height/building:levels tag.
layers.accuracy_class: APPROXIMATE MASSING, not measured architecture; footprints OSM (~few m), heights generic (8 m) unless tagged

layers.source: OSM road centerlines, drawn as flat ribbons at the local datum.
layers.accuracy_class: APPROXIMATE centerlines; OSM (~few m), no measured width/grade
layers.expected_input: data/context/osm_petoskey_roads.geojson (EPSG:4326 LineString features; fetch via scripts/unreal/fetch_osm_context.py)

layers.source: Calculated solar position (NOAA solar-position algorithm) for Petoskey MI at named summer-evening timestamps; drives a directional light + sky.
layers.accuracy_class: COMPUTED solar position (NOAA, ~0.01 deg); apparent elevation includes Saemundsson refraction. Sky colour/intensity is atmospheric (artistic), the SUN DIRECTION is calculated.

layers.source: Camera derived from the audited seating + bay-view axis: an upper seating row looking over the stage toward the bay/horizon along azimuth 330.
layers.accuracy_class: Position from audited seating geometry (exact); aim along the audited bay-view axis. Separate from the 7 audited cameras (does not change the design camera count).
